candidate_artifacts.notes: Initial repository function scan. Contains per-file symbol entries with docstring metadata. 414 Python files discovered, 357 candidates scanned (57 excluded by rule). Represents Stage: repository_scan.
Full function-level registry with symbol, module, file_path, and semantic metadata per entry. Substantive and populated. Represents Stage: function_extraction.
Per-function cluster assignments with cluster_id, cluster_label, cluster_top_terms, and semantic_signature. Substantive output. Represents Stage: cluster_analysis.
Per-module semantic profiles with module_path, staging_group, purpose, runtime_role, and subsystem. Substantive. Represents Stage: semantic_extraction.
Registry of salvageable function blocks with function_name, module, module_name. Represents the FBC (Function Block Core) registry stage. Substantive output.

Summary artifact for the module extraction pass. Generated 2026-03-10, source_directory /workspaces/Logos/_Dev_Resources/STAGING/APPLICATION_FUNCTIONS. Fields: total_python_files_found=414, excluded_by_rule=57, candidates_scanned=357, stubs=27, duplicates=114. Small summary file; substantive detail in registry JSON.

Repo-wide symbol import index with symbol, source_module, imported_by_file, import_line_number, import_statement, alias. Large and substantive (3.1 MB). Older than runtime-targeted variant (2026-03-05). Covers full repo scope.
Semantic packet classification with packet_id, module_count, is_cycle, classification, class_scores. Most recent artifact in the set. Represents semantic packet discovery pass.
Human-readable cluster analysis report. Header timestamp: 2026-03-10T18:22:30.219887+00:00 UTC. Narrative summary of the cluster analysis run.
Index of consolidated import architecture toolkit outputs. Dated 2026-03-10. Notes 36 artifact files from import architecture pipeline. Serves as navigation manifest for AST/import analysis outputs.

Cross-cluster illegal import violations with source_module, illegal_import, depth, source_cluster, target_cluster, classification. 31 total cross-cluster violations (22 auto-repairable, 9 manual). Substantive.
Cluster-level dependency graph with cluster_nodes array. Inter-cluster edge structure for dependency traversal.
Full module-to-cluster assignment map. Largest cluster artifact. Keys are fully qualified module paths, values are cluster_id strings (e.g. LOGOS_SYSTEM.RUNTIME_CORES.RUNTIME_EXECUTION_CORE).

Module-to-cluster_id integer mapping. Explicitly contains DRAC_Core modules (e.g. LOGOS_SYSTEM.RUNTIME_CORES.RUNTIME_OPPERATIONS_CORE.Dynamic_Reconstruction_Adaptive_Compilation_Protocol.DRAC_Core). Confirms DRAC modules were scanned and classified.
Per-cluster summary with cluster_id, dominant_layer, module_count, internal_edges, external_edges_out, external_edges_in, density, top_level_packages. Cluster 2 has 153 modules. Substantive.

Cluster-variant of repair feasibility report. Fields: total_cross_cluster_violations=31, auto_repairable=22, require_manual_review=9, plus per-rule entries with source_module, illegal_import, target_cluster, proposed_facade.
Runtime-scoped symbol import index (subset of repo_symbol_imports, filtered to runtime surface). Fields: source_module, target_module, symbol. 675 KB, substantive.

AST canonical root normalization phase report. Fields: phase=Phase_2A_AST_Canonical_Root_Normalization, total_files_modified=1, total_imports_rewritten=1. Older artifact from Phase 2 (February 2026). Shows AST mutation was performed.

Nexus structural extraction artifact. Per-file records with header_metadata_block, nexus_class_names, public_methods, has_tick_method, has_register_participant, has_ingest. Represents structural extraction of Nexus interfaces relevant to DRAC indexing.

CRITICAL: File contains only empty array [] (2 bytes). This is the dedicated DRAC touchpoint index artifact but it was never populated. The drac_index pipeline stage has a registered output path with no substantive data. This is the primary gap in the DRAC pipeline.

RGE Stage 21-24 analysis: Cognition Signal Broadcasting Infrastructure. Fields: stage_range, title, status=success, modules_created. Does not directly map to a DRAC pipeline stage; matched by 'index' substring in parent directory context. Classification: UNKNOWN (RGE-specific).

repository_scan.notes: 414 Python files scanned, 357 candidates, 57 excluded by rule. Dated 2026-03-10.

ast_parse.notes: Phase_2A_AST_Canonical_Root_Normalization confirmed. Supplemented by import architecture cluster outputs generated by ast_parser.py (2026-03-10).

function_extraction.notes: 859 KB registry of all extracted functions with full semantic metadata. Dated 2026-03-10.

fbc_registry.notes: 588 KB Function Block Core registry of salvageable function blocks. Dated 2026-03-10.

drac_index.notes: File exists (2 bytes) but contains only empty array []. No substantive DRAC index artifact found across all 222 files in Reports. The drac_indexer.py output path is registered but the data was never committed. DRAC module references appear in cluster_membership.json (cluster_analysis stage) but a dedicated DRAC symbol/touchpoint index is absent.

cluster_analysis.notes: Multiple substantive cluster analysis outputs present: cluster_map (198 KB), cluster_membership (145 KB), cluster_summary (195 KB), cluster_dependency_graph (76 KB), cluster_boundary_violations (197 KB). Dated 2026-03-10. High confidence in completeness.

drac_state_rationale: Five of six DRAC pipeline stages have substantive artifacts: repository_scan, ast_parse, function_extraction, fbc_registry, and cluster_analysis are all present with large, populated, and recently dated outputs (2026-03-10). The drac_index stage is the sole gap: PHASE6B_DRAC_TOUCHPOINTS.json exists at the expected output path but contains only an empty array []. No alternative DRAC index artifact was located across all 222 files in the Reports tree. The drac_indexer.py tool (Static_Analysis/drac_indexer.py) is registered in runtime_tools_generation_report.json as updated but its output has not been materialized. Recommendation: run drac_indexer.py to populate the DRAC index; all prerequisite artifacts (function registry, cluster membership, FBC registry) are available as inputs.
